title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Update: Death toll rises to 2 as rescue operations continue in Kyiv. Two people are now confirmed dead and 40 others injured after Russia’s massive overnight attack on May 14. City officials told Suspilne that the strike partially destroyed a large apartment building on the capital’s eastern bank, where 11 people have been rescued from the rubble so far.
description_en: Update: Death toll rises to 2 as rescue operations continue in Kyiv. Two people are now confirmed dead and 40 others injured after Russia’s massive overnight attack on May 14. City officials told Suspilne that the strike partially destroyed a large apartment building on the capital’s eastern bank, where 11 people have been rescued from the rubble so far.

City officials told Suspilne that the strike partially destroyed a large apartment building on the capital’s eastern bank, where 11 people have been rescued from the rubble so far.

title: Kyiv: Air defense active

title: Kyiv: 56 missiles launched
description: A rescue operation is currently underway in Kyiv at the site of a Russian drone attack on a nine-story residential building - the entrance to the building has been completely destroyed. Dozens of people were saved. Unfortunately, one person died. My condolences to family and friends. There may still be people under the rubble. Overnight, the Russians launched more than 670 attack drones and 56 missiles over Ukraine. There were ballistic, aeroballistic, winged strikes...
description_en: A rescue operation is currently underway in Kyiv at the site of a Russian drone attack on a nine-story residential building - the entrance to the building has been completely destroyed. Dozens of people were saved. Unfortunately, one person died. My condolences to family and friends. There may still be people under the rubble. Overnight, the Russians launched more than 670 attack drones and 56 missiles over Ukraine. There were ballistic, aeroballistic, winged strikes...
description_uk: Зараз у Києві триває рятувальна операція на місці російського дронового удару по житловій девʼятиповерхівці – у будинку повністю зруйновано підʼїзд. Врятовано десятки людей. На жаль, одна людина загинула. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Під завалами ще можуть бути люди. За ніч росіяни випустили по Україні понад 670 ударних дронів і 56 ракет. Були удари балістикою, аеробалістикою, крилатими...

In total, radio engineering troops of the Air Force recorded...

Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано...

title: 56 missiles + 675 drones intercepted
description: That night, the air defense forces shot down 652 out of 675 UAVs and 41 out of 56 missiles, - the Armed Forces of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Hits were recorded in 24 places, the attack continues.
description_en: That night, the air defense forces shot down 652 out of 675 UAVs and 41 out of 56 missiles, - the Armed Forces of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Hits were recorded in 24 places, the attack continues.
description_uk: Этой ночью силы ПВО сбили 652 из 675 БПЛА и 41 из 56 ракет, - ВС ВСУ Зафиксировано попадания в 24 местах, атака продолжается.

title: Kyiv: Missile launch detected
description: Update: 1 killed, 16 injured in Kyiv as Russia's mass daytime attack continues overnight, causing building collapse. One person was killed, and 16 others were injured, with 10 people rescued from under a partially collapsed building in Kyiv overnight on May 14 as Russia launched a large-scale missile attack across Ukraine, extending a mass daytime assault into the night.

title: Kyiv: 14 killed, 80 injured
description: Update: At least 14 killed, over 80 injured in one of 'longest mass attacks' of Russia's war against Ukraine. Russian forces launched hundreds of drones across Ukraine on the afternoon of May 13, targeting regions far from the front lines and damaging homes, critical infrastructure, and energy facilities across the country. Photo: Svilana Olynshchuk / Telegram

This is a gross, deliberate violation of the rules and customs of war."

title: Attack attack
description: An important message of condemnation of the Russian attack against Ukraine from the Prime Minister of Hungary, Peter Magyar. Moscow has once again demonstrated that it is a common threat not only to Ukraine, but also to neighboring countries and Europe in general. The attack continues. The first rockets were launched. Our common stance is essential to ending this brutal war. Thank you for your concern and strong position!
description_en: An important message of condemnation of the Russian attack against Ukraine from the Prime Minister of Hungary, Peter Magyar. Moscow has once again demonstrated that it is a common threat not only to Ukraine, but also to neighboring countries and Europe in general. The attack continues. The first rockets were launched. Our common stance is essential to ending this brutal war. Thank you for your concern and strong position!
description_uk: Важливий меседж засудження російської атаки проти України від Прем’єр-міністра Угорщини Петера Мадяра. Москва знову продемонструвала, що є спільною загрозою не лише для України, а й для сусідніх країн і Європи загалом. Атака триває. Здійснено запуск перших ракет. Наша спільна позиція важлива для припинення цієї жорстокої війни. Дякую за небайдужість та сильну позицію!

description: Russia begins to censor information about terrorist attacks and UAV landings: Moscow has been chosen as a test site As reported by the mayor's office of the swamp capital, there are restrictions on the publication of the aftermath of terrorist attacks, including UAV landings.
